desc: Cannot be used as material for an Xyz Summon, except for the Xyz Summon of a FIRE Warrior monster. You can Normal Summon this card without Tributing, but its original ATK becomes 1300. Once per turn: You can make all Level 4 Beast-Warrior monsters you currently control become Level 8 until the end of this turn.
